verdict.notes: composite: 54; detailed summary; detailed dimensions; 2 strengths; 2 weaknesses; 7 paths; confidence breakdown

roast.notes: score: 5/10; detailed verdict; 6 items; 5 risks; 3 recs; severity variety

website.notes: has URL; detailed summary; 3 strengths; 4 improvements; 4 recs; actionable recs

genericRoastPatterns: Competitive market warning repeated across blueprints

improvements.title: Eliminate URL hallucinations
improvements.evidence: 0 hallucinated URLs across 10 blueprints. Every deterministic blueprint fabricates a domain.
improvements.impact: Add to prompt: "NEVER fabricate URLs. Use 'yourstartup.example.com' for all URL fields. Real URLs require verification."

improvements.title: Inject real market data into prompts
improvements.evidence: Avg specificity: 8.5/10. Blueprints lack real competitor names, real TAM/SAM/SOM, real regulatory bodies.
improvements.impact: Add: "Cite 3-5 REAL competitors with actual URLs. Use real market sizing data from Gartner/Statista/McKinsey. If unsure, say 'TBD'."

improvements.title: Ban generic startup jargon with explicit blacklist
improvements.evidence: 4 generic phrases found: leverage, disrupt, seamless, end-to-end, world-class, cutting-edge, next-gen, game-changing, revolutionary, empower, transform, streamline, unlock.
improvements.impact: Add: "BANNED PHRASES (using any = automatic failure): leverage, disrupt, synergy, ecosystem, scalable, innovative, game-changing, seamless, end-to-end, world-class, cutting-edge, next-gen, revolutionary, best-in-class, empower, transform, streamline, unlock. Replace with concrete specifics."

improvements.title: Force brutal honesty in roast and verdict sections
improvements.evidence: 0 weak/vague recommendations. Roast scores cluster around 5-7 (diplomatic). Verdicts avoid saying 'this will fail'.
improvements.impact: Add: "The roast must be BRUTALLY honest. If the idea is mediocre, say so. Avoid 'consider X' — say 'You will fail unless you do X'. A 'pass' badge should be rare (top 20% of ideas)."

improvements.title: Require concrete, measurable roadmap milestones
improvements.evidence: Avg actionability: 8.0/10. Roadmap items use vague verbs like 'build' and 'develop' without measurable outcomes.
improvements.impact: Add: "Each roadmap item MUST include a measurable deliverable. Example: 'Ship landing page with 3 waitlist signups from 10 cold emails' — NOT 'Build website'."

improvements.title: Differentiate revenue projections by stage with hard constraints
improvements.evidence: Revenue projections use similar scales ($10K-50K/mo) regardless of ideation vs seed stage. Growth rates are unrealistically smooth.
improvements.impact: Add: "Revenue projections MUST match stage: Ideation: $0-5K/mo for 12 months. Pre-seed: $1-20K/mo. Seed: $10-100K/mo. Use realistic month-over-month growth (5-20% for early stage)."

improvements.title: Reduce deterministic template similarity
improvements.evidence: All deterministic blueprints share identical color palettes, similar missions, and same structural patterns. Lacks variety.
improvements.impact: Add randomized elements to deterministic engine: vary color palettes by industry, use different mission templates, add industry-specific language.

improvements.title: Improve tagline originality
improvements.evidence: Avg tagline length: 32 chars. Many follow "X for Y" pattern. Lacks memorability.
improvements.impact: Add: "Taglines must be memorable and specific. Avoid 'X for Y' pattern. Use metaphors, wordplay, or provocative statements. Max 8 words."

improvements.title: Add real competitor differentiation analysis
improvements.evidence: ICP sections lack competitor-specific differentiation. Pain points are generic rather than market-specific.
improvements.impact: Add: "For each pain point, explain why existing solutions fail. Name specific competitors and their weaknesses. Show how your approach differs."

improvements.title: Stage-appropriate scoring and recommendations
improvements.evidence: Avg realism: 7.8/10. Ideation-stage startups receive similar scoring and advice as seed-stage companies.
improvements.impact: Add: "Adjust all scoring and recommendations based on stage. Ideation = idea validation focus. Pre-seed = MVP and first customers. Seed = growth and scaling."
